description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
A Zoox vehicle in manual mode was proceeding southbound in the turn lane on Sixth Street with a green light, yielding to a pedestrian 
before completing a right turn onto eastbound Harrison Street, in San Francisco, CA with turn signals illuminated. A large truck in the left 
adjacent lane abruptly turned right and cut in front of the Zoox vehicle making contact with the left front sensor. There were no injuries, the 
other vehicle did not stop to exchange information, and police were not called. 
Print
Clear Form
